headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Camden Prop Trust, Raises Price Target to $122
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains Camden Prop Trust (NYSE:CPT) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $116 to $122.
